metadata.title: Folo
metadata.description: AI RSS Reader for deep, noise-free reading with contextual AI.
metadata.keywords: Folo, AI RSS reader, RSS, summarize, translate, research, open source, content discovery, information browser

hero.title: <brand>Folo</brand> is the <highlight>AI RSS Reader</highlight>
hero.bodyLine1: The AI that reads the internet for you,
hero.bodyLine2: cutting through noise to surface the knowledge you actually care about.
hero.agentBody: Read <skill>https://api.folo.is/skill.md</skill> and follow the instructions to use Folo.

features.headline: Reading reimagined in the AI era

twin.label: Digital Twin
twin.titleStrong: Everything you Folo trains your AI
twin.titleRest: to think like you. It remembers, adapts, and evolves with every update.

trustedBy.headline: Teams already using Folo.
trustedBy.body: We sampled production work-email registrations to find the companies that have already started reading with Folo.

feeds.label: Feeds
feeds.detail: Sources across blogs, research, newsletters, social profiles, and more.

entries.label: Entries
entries.detail: A huge reading graph that AI can search, summarize, and connect for you.

readers.label: Readers
readers.detail: People already using Folo to keep up without drowning in noise.

follows.label: Follows
follows.detail: Subscriptions flowing through production timelines right now.

builtOpen.title: Built Open
builtOpen.body: Open source, verifiable, and easy to inspect.

socialProof.headline: Folo is how the curious read in the AI era.

metadata.title: Download Folo
metadata.description: Download Folo for Desktop or use it on the Web. Available on macOS, Windows, and Linux.

hero.title: Download <brand>Folo</brand>
hero.subtitle: Get the AI RSS Reader on Desktop, or open it instantly on the Web.

platforms.footer: By downloading, you agree to our <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

metadata.title: Pricing
metadata.description: Choose the Folo plan that fits your reading workflow.

pricing.headline: Plans for every reading workflow
pricing.body: Compare limits, AI capabilities, and workflow scale before you choose.

descriptions.free: For getting started with a calm reading workflow.
descriptions.basic: For solo readers who want more subscriptions and more AI.
descriptions.plus: For power users who rely on AI every day.
descriptions.pro: For heavy workflows, large libraries, and maximum limits.
descriptions.admin: For heavy workflows, large libraries, and maximum limits.
